heading: Transfer of administration of Job Corps program to Employment and Training Administration
label: 3193a Transfer of administration of Job Corps program to Employment and Training Administration
text: The Secretary of Labor shall submit to the Committees on Appropriations of the House of Representatives and the Senate a plan for the transfer of the administration of the Job Corps program authorized under title I–C of the Workforce Investment Act of 1998 from the Office of the Secretary to the Employment and Training Administration. As of the date that is 30 days after the date of submission of such plan, the Secretary may transfer the administration and appropriated funds of the program from the Office of the Secretary and the provisions of shall no longer be applicable.1section 2883a of this titleSee References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThe Workforce Investment Act of 1998, referred to in text, is , , , and was repealed by , §§ 506, 511(a), , , 1705, effective . Title I–C of the Act probably means subtitle C of title I of , which was classified generally to subchapter III (former § 2881 et seq.) of former chapter 30 of this title. Pursuant to , references to a provision of the Workforce Investment Act of 1998 are deemed to refer to the corresponding provision of the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act, , , , effective . CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Department of Labor Appropriations Act, 2010, and also as part of the Departments of Labor, Health and Human Services, and Education, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2010, and the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2010, and not as part of title I of the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act which comprises this subchapter.Section was formerly classified to .section 2883b of this title
